senses.gloss: to throw forcefully; to hurl; to fling; to shoot; to propel

examples.text: مَنْ كَانَ بَيْتُهُ مِنْ زُجَاجٍ فَلَا يَقْذِفِ النَّاسَ بِالْحِجَارَةِ.
examples.english: Those who live in glass houses should not throw stones.

senses.gloss: to throw forcefully; to hurl; to fling; to shoot; to propel; to pour out; to eject; to discharge
to throw forcefully; to hurl; to fling; to shoot; to propel; to ejaculate (semen)
to slander, to defame; to accuse falsely (someone, usually a woman) of fornication
fling (also as in the sexual sense)
